name: Roasted Wild Duckling
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the ducklings inside and out with salt and pepper.
2. Combine onions, apples, celery, and minced garlic in a bowl and mix well.
3. Stuff each duckling loosely with the onion mixture.
4. Place the stuffed ducklings, breast down, into a roasting pan.
5. Pour consomme and wine over the top of the ducklings.
6. Sprinkle Worcestershire sauce evenly over the ducklings.
7. Roast at 325°F for 3 hours, basting often.
8. Turn the ducklings breast-side up.
9. Continue to roast at 325°F until browned, basting often (30-60 minutes).
10. Serve hot.
